message:
test(proptest): expand pane_tiers (15→26) and voi (15→25) property tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add serde roundtrip coverage for PaneTier, TierConfig, TierMetrics,
VoiConfig, BackpressureMultipliers, SchedulingDecision, ScheduleResult,
VoiSnapshot, and PaneSnapshotEntry types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
